args0.x_tooltip: ID from /api/action/motion/list. The app resolves task_type and motion/legacy/preset target from this ID.

args0.name: BLOCKING_TYPE_HELP
args0.src: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='18' height='18' viewBox='0 0 18 18'><circle cx='9' cy='9' r='7.25' fill='white' stroke='black' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='9' y='12.2' text-anchor='middle' font-family='Arial,sans-serif' font-size='11' font-weight='700' fill='black'>?</text></svg>
args0.x_tooltip: Scheduler blocking mode while the motion is running.

args0.name: BLOCKING_TYPE
options: LOOP - Re-execute the motion until released.
WAIT - Keep waiting after completion until release.

args0.name: DURATION_MS_HELP
args0.src: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='18' height='18' viewBox='0 0 18 18'><circle cx='9' cy='9' r='7.25' fill='white' stroke='black' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='9' y='12.2' text-anchor='middle' font-family='Arial,sans-serif' font-size='11' font-weight='700' fill='black'>?</text></svg>
args0.x_tooltip: Optional extra timeout. If set, stop_motion is triggered after this many milliseconds.

x_description: Q9 motion ID를 지정해 motion을 시작한다.

x_parameters.name: motion_id
x_parameters.description: ID from /api/action/motion/list. The app resolves task_type and motion/legacy/preset target from this ID.

x_parameters.name: blocking_type
x_parameters.description: Scheduler blocking mode while the motion is running.

x_parameters.name: duration_ms
x_parameters.description: Optional extra timeout. If set, stop_motion is triggered after this many milliseconds.
